_source.name: ACS 2022 5-Year Estimates, Table B25040 (House Heating Fuel)
_source.methodology: County-level residential heating fuel shares. Denominator excludes "no fuel used" (B25040_E010). Solar (B25040_E008) folded into electricity. Coal (B25040_E006) + wood (B25040_E007) combined as wood. B25040_E009 (other, ~0.5%) excluded.
